$comment: Domain Event - emitted after successful page creation. Note causationId references the UI intent event.

$invariants.correlationId_propagation: correlationId MUST match the UI intent
$invariants.causationId_linkage: causationId MUST reference the eventId that caused this event
$invariants.idempotencyKey_preservation: idempotencyKey MUST be preserved from intent to domain event
$invariants.tenantId_immutable: tenantId MUST match the intent and cannot change
$invariants.principalId_immutable: principalId MUST match the authenticated principal from intent
